Definition: Posterior nasal spine - intersection of the palatum durum and the pterygopalatine fossa.
Basion - most inferior posterior point of the occipital bone.
Midpoint of Sella and Basion (S-Ba midpoint) for Ad2 vertical level reference.
Intersection of the posterior pharyngeal wall with the line from PNS to Basion (PNS-Ba).
Posterior pharyngeal wall at the level of the So point (midpoint of S-Ba), projected horizontally.
Tip of the soft palate (uvula).
Posterior pharyngeal wall at the narrowest retropalatal level (behind SP).
Deepest point of the vallecula (junction of the tongue base and epiglottis).
Tip of the epiglottis.
Posterior pharyngeal wall at the level of the epiglottis tip.
Posterior pharyngeal wall at the level of the vallecula.
Posterior border of the uvula (posterior soft palate contour).
Lower pharyngeal wall point at the level of C3-C4 intervertebral disc.
Base of the epiglottis - most posterior point at the junction of the epiglottis and tongue base.
Tip of the tongue - most anterior point of the tongue body.
Gonion - the point of intersection of the ramus plane and the mandibular plane.
Point B - the deepest midline point on the mandible between infradentale and pogonion.
Nasopharyngeal airway area enclosed by PNS-Ad1-Ad2-SP.
Oropharyngeal airway area enclosed by SP-Ad3-Vallecula-Epiglottis-UP.
Hypopharyngeal airway area enclosed by Vallecula-Epiglottis-PASbot-Ad4.
Nasopharyngeal airway depth at the level of PNS.
Retropalatal airway depth at the level of the soft palate.
Hypopharyngeal airway depth at the level of the vallecula.
Narrowest retropalatal airway dimension (behind SP).
Nasopharyngeal airway depth at the So level (alternative nasopharyngeal measurement).
Width of the nasopharynx at the level of the uvula posterior (UP).
Width of the lower pharynx at the C3-C4 level.
Minimum cross-sectional width of the upper pharynx (retropalatal).
Minimum cross-sectional width of the lower pharynx (retroglossal).
Superior posterior airway space - PAS at the level of the soft palate tip.
Middle airway space - at the mid-oropharyngeal level.
Inferior airway space - at the hypopharyngeal level.
Vertical distance from PNS to the base of epiglottis (Eb).
Oblique airway length from the base of epiglottis to PNS.
Angle formed by the nasopharyngeal airway walls (PNS-Ad1-Ad2).
Ratio of adenoid thickness (Ad1-Ad2 projected) to nasopharyngeal depth (PNS-Ad1).
